command: kosmos run 'How does temperature affect enzyme activity in metabolic pathways?' --domain biology --max-iterations 1

critical_bug.description: E2E run completes instantly with 0 hypotheses, 0 experiments, 0 API calls
critical_bug.mechanism: When workflow starts in INITIALIZING state (not GENERATING_HYPOTHESES) and hypothesis_pool is empty, the condition at line 2065 checks 'state != GENERATING_HYPOTHESES' which is True for INITIALIZING, causing immediate convergence
critical_bug.fix: Add INITIALIZING to the excluded states in the convergence check: if current_state not in [GENERATING_HYPOTHESES, INITIALIZING]

paper_comparison.paper_claim: ~166 data analysis rollouts, ~42,000 lines of code, ~1,500 papers read per run
paper_comparison.implementation_actual: 0 rollouts, 0 lines of code, 0 papers read
paper_comparison.gap: CRITICAL - CLI is non-functional for E2E research
